title: Pineapple Baby and the Island Harvest Mystery
shortDescription: On Fruit Baby Island, something strange is happening. Pineapple Baby’s pineapple fields, Strawberry Baby’s strawberry patches, Kiwi Baby’s kiwi vineyard, and Coconut Baby’s coconut trees have stopped growing fruit. As the island harvest begins to fade, the friends must follow hidden clues, uncover Tiki Trouble’s mischief, and use their special gifts to restore what was harmed. Along the way, they learn that ruining what others need is never the answer — and that making things right is how kindness begins to grow again.
